what_was_built: tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py (14 tests covering schema + safety + integration)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: per-seed extra_files extension so the arbitrage lane can include SPARTA-side protocol docs as matched reports (lane stays IDEA)
protocol_definitions: Pure arbitrage = simultaneous round-trip with positive cash flow after EVERY realistic cost; rare in liquid public markets.
Apparent edge != profit (fees, spread, slippage, latency, withdrawal latency, counterparty haircut, withdrawal limits).
Statistical / relative-value is NOT arbitrage (uses its own protocol).
Five categories: cross_exchange_spot, spot_perp_basis_funding, triangular, futures_calendar, statistical_relative_value.
Validation phases: P0_protocol (this), P1_data_contract, P2_data_acquisition, P3_offline_replay, P4_holdout_oos, P5_decision_gate, P6_periodic_review.
Live trading / paper-order execution is P_NONE -- not a phase of this protocol; requires SEPARATE authorization with a different protocol.

guardrails_held: lane is not promoted to ACTIVE just because protocol docs exist
lane never reaches STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Deterministic re-selection chose the same queue item; no artificial nudge was applied.

how_it_fits_into_sparta_pipeline: Strategy Factory Routine Layer v1 (98f8918) -> JARVIS Strategy Factory Dashboard (5fe3107) -> Next Bundle Generator v1 (a699198) -> Strategy Candidate Registry v1 (191948c) -> Arbitrage Research Protocol v1 (this bundle, P0_protocol phase).
Subsequent phases (data contract, acquisition, replay, OOS) are SEPARATE, separately-authorized bundles. None of them run live or paper-order execution.
recommended_next_bundle: P1 — Arbitrage Data Contract v1 (one category at a time; recommended cross_exchange_spot OR spot_perp_basis_funding); spec only, no data pull
OR Data QA / freeze workflow (cross-cutting; benefits any later P2 acquisition)
Crypto-D1 lane is PARKED; revisiting requires a NEW hypothesis, not a re-tune
